name: Jaboukie Young-White
blurb: He served as a correspondent on The Daily Show and has written for shows including Big Mouth and American Vandal.
bio: Jaboukie Young-White is an American stand-up comedian, writer, actor, and musician from Chicago. He served as a correspondent on The Daily Show and has written for shows including Big Mouth and American Vandal. His comedy blends pop culture, identity, and absurdist observation.

timeline.ev: TV debut performing stand-up on The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
Joins The Daily Show with Trevor Noah as a correspondent
Co-wrote Netflix's American Vandal; joined The Daily Show as correspondent
Tapes a half-hour for Comedy Central Stand-Up Presents
Recurring role as Sam in Only Murders in the Building; led film Dating and New York
Voiced Ethan Clade in Disney's Strange World; released debut single 'BBC'
Releases his debut music album All Who Can't Hear Must Feel
Released debut album All who can't hear must feel

accolades: Daily Show with Trevor Noah correspondent (2018-2021, 57 episodes)
Received the 2024 Comedy Connoisseur Award at Variety's Power of Comedy event

movies_tv.t: The Daily Show with Trevor Noah
